title: 10 best herbal teas for pink eye
intro_desc: Herbal teas for pink eye are natural remedies that help alleviate the symptoms and support the healing process of this contagious eye infection. These teas are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that soothe the affected eye and promote recovery. The best herbal teas for pink eye include Calendula officinalis, Echinacea purpurea, Euphrasia officinalis, Echinacea angustifolia, Symphytum officinale, Aloe barbadensis, Eucalyptus globulus, Hydrastis canadensis, Aloe vera, and Ginkgo biloba. If left untreated, pink eye can lead to vision problems, eye pain, and blurred vision, significantly impacting daily activities, work, and social life.
